titleStmt.title: SII 25.296: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 296. (A.R. No. 296 of 1908.) TIRUKKAḶITTAṬṬAI, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription may palaeographically be assigned to the middle of 10th century A.D. The record may be assigned to Sundarachōḷa Parāntaka II, whose other records from this place credit him with the title pāṇḍiyaṉaichchuṟam-iṟakkiṉa (who drove the Pāṇḍya into the forest).

It records a gift of one-eighth (of a vēli ?) of land to the west of the tank, for maintaining a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirukuḍittiṭṭaipperumāḷ at Amaninārāyaṇach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, on the northern bank of the river, by Porumāṉ Poṟṟi, wife of (maṇavāṭṭi) of a certain Neṟkuppaiuḍaiyāṇ.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX, No. 5.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kopparakecari panmarkku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu vaṭakarai tevatāṉa brahmateyam Amaṉinārāyaṇac caturvvetimaṅkalattu tirukkuṭittiṭṭaip perumaāḷukku neṟkkuppai Uṭaiyāṉ
maṇavāṭṭi perumāṉ poṟṟi cantrāticcavaṟ Erikkavaittatu tirukuḷattiṉ me(l)lai Araikkāl Itu panmāheśvararakṣai ...
Digital edition of SII 25.296 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
